## How To Test
1. `npm install`
2. `npm run start:dev`
3. Login with configured credentials

## Checklist
- [ ] Scope is focused and relevant to the issue
- [ ] No secrets or `.env` values are committed
- [ ] `README.md` updated if behavior/config changed
- [ ] `settings.js` reviewed for runtime side effects
- [ ] Local startup works (`npm run start:dev`)
